qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Offside, Ghana. Iñaki Williams is caught offside.
Noni Madueke (England) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Jude Bellingham (England).
Anthony Gordon (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Declan Rice (England) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Reece James from a direct free kick.

events.description: 德克兰·赖斯射门偏出。 里斯·詹姆斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Harry Kane (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Elliot Anderson (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Anthony Gordon.

events.description: 艾略特·安德森射门被封堵。 安东尼·哥顿参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Declan Rice (England) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is blocked.

events.description: 德克兰·赖斯射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Jonas Adjetey.
Foul by Ezri Konsa (England).
Marc Guéhi (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 伊尼亚基·威廉姆斯犯规。

events.description: 德克兰·赖斯射门偏出。 诺丽玛杜克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Marc Guéhi (England).

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Jonas Adjetey.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jude Bellingham (England).
First Half ends, England 0, Ghana 0.
Second Half begins England 0, Ghana 0.
Anthony Gordon (England) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt blocked. Marvin Senaya (Ghana) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Jerome Opoku.

events.description: 马文·塞纳亚射门被封堵。 杰罗姆·奥波库参与进攻。
